steps.title: Find the sample mean
steps.content:
Add the five sampled tree counts and divide by $5$.
$$
\frac{54+62+48+55+76}{5}=59
$$
The sample estimates $59$ trees per acre.

steps.title: Scale to the forest
steps.content:
Multiply the estimated trees per acre by the $247$ acres in the forest.
$$
59\cdot247=14{,}573
$$

steps.title: Choose the range
steps.content: The estimate $14{,}573$ is between $14{,}000$ and $15{,}000$. The answer is C.
